news.title: RBC Cuts Price Target on Sibanye Stillwater to $17 From $18.50, Keeps Outperform Rating
Is Sibanye-Stillwater (SBSW) One of the Best African Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds?

Sibanye Stillwater Limited ("Sibanye-Stillwater" or the "Group"), through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Stillwater Mining Company (the "Offeror"), announced today its offers to purchase for cash of its 4.000% Senior Notes due 2026 and 4.500% Senior Notes due 2029
